positiveClaims: Local JSON review packet product entry is covered through MENU_COMMAND_HANDLERS with default main-owned dialog selection, fs stat, fs read, JSON parse, session activation, and Review/Comments runtime opening.
Local JSON review packet import remains preview/session only and does not mutate manuscript scene text.
A separate exact text apply action after local packet import writes through the existing safe writer and exposes a receipt only after apply.
The exact text apply receipt carries recovery evidence with readable snapshot proof matching the pre-apply scene text.
Same-scene batch exact apply after local packet import remains controlled and does not invent a singular receipt on the Review surface.
Mixed local packets with structural review data remain preview/manual-only and do not build write context.
Clear Review Session returns the Review surface to an empty state without reverting manuscript text.
nonClaims: No DOCX review import is claimed.
No cross-scene batch atomicity is claimed.
No multi-file transaction truth is claimed.
No manuscript write is performed by local packet import.
No full review import automation is claimed.
No full import/export completion beyond the existing MVP closeout is claimed.
No release readiness, packaged readiness, cross-platform readiness, full npm green, full Word layout parity, PDF export, EPUB export, HTML export, cloud, sync, accounts, or Y9 admission is claimed.
layerDecisions: Import layer validates and activates a review session only.
Apply layer remains separate and writes only through existing exact apply commands.
Review surface remains UI/session visibility, not project truth.
Receipt and recovery are verified only after apply, never after import.
Local JSON packet proof remains separate from DOCX review import.

newOrExpandedTestCases: review mutate port contract: local packet menu command uses default main file intake and opens comments
review mutate port contract: local packet e2e exact apply writes only after local import
review mutate port contract: local packet e2e batch exact apply stays same-scene and receipt-free on surface
review mutate port contract: local mixed packet remains preview and manual-only for structural changes

machineChecks.command: node --test sector-m command and review surface targeted set
node --test capability and command bus targeted set

postCommitCleanTreeChecks.command: node --test review bridge clean-tree targeted set
node --test command, UI, capability, and bus clean-tree targeted set

agentAudits.localResolution: addressed by adding local packet E2E exact apply, batch apply, manual-only mixed packet, and command handler default intake coverage
addressed by executing MENU_COMMAND_HANDLERS importLocalPacket with default dialog/stat/read path and openComments side-effect assertion
